name: Troms (Norway, 1960-2020)
description: A red field charged with a gold heraldic figure.
history: Troms was a county (fylke) of northern Norway whose flag was the heraldic banner of its county coat of arms. It existed in this form from 1960 until 1 January 2020, when it was merged with Finnmark to form Troms og Finnmark county. The merger was reversed in 2024, with Troms re-established under a new arms.

features.symbolism: heraldic banner of the former Troms county arms: a stylised gold figure on a red field
the central heraldic figure characteristic of Troms's former county arms
